exam_price_notes: $93 exam fee + ~$30 test center fee. Fee waivers for military/low-income.
target_audience: Nonscience majors taking introductory courses in biological and physical sciences
recommended_experience: Understanding of scientific concepts expected of college students meeting a distribution or general education requirement in the natural sciences

prerequisites.description: Understanding of scientific concepts expected of college students meeting a distribution or general education requirement in the natural sciences

retake_policy.notes: Each institution reserves the right to set its own credit-granting policy, which may differ from the American Council on Education (ACE). Contact your college to find out the score required for credit and the number of credit hours granted.

objectives.title: Origin and evolution of life; classification of organisms
Cell organization, cell division, chemical nature of the gene, bioenergetics, and biosynthesis
Structure, function, and development in organisms; patterns of heredity
Concepts of population biology with emphasis on ecology
Atomic and nuclear structure and properties, elementary particles, and nuclear reactions
Chemical elements, compounds and reactions, molecular structure and bonding
Heat, thermodynamics, and states of matter; classical mechanics; relativity
Electricity and magnetism, waves, light, and sound
The universe: galaxies, stars, and the solar system
The Earth: atmosphere, hydrosphere, structure features, geologic processes, and history

official_study_resources.title: CLEP Natural Sciences Examination Guide
official_study_resources.notes: The Natural Sciences exam covers intro-level topics for nonscience majors surveying both biological and physical sciences.

official_study_resources.title: Sample Questions: Natural Sciences
official_study_resources.notes: Answer sample questions related to the Natural Sciences exam.

official_study_resources.title: What Your CLEP Score Means
official_study_resources.notes: Guide to understanding how CLEP scores are calculated and credit-granting recommendations for all exams.

official_study_resources.title: ACE Credit Recommendations
official_study_resources.notes: Recommendations for credit-granting scores from the American Council on Education.
